purpose: Fetch the enum dictionary for the TB create body — report types, settings flag keys, selection mode keys. Endpoint is global (no clientId in URL) — same enum applies to every engagement.

trialBalanceReportTypes.value: Summary by groups, sub-groups and accounts

gotchas: Global endpoint — no clientId in path. Same enum returned regardless of engagement.
